payload.title: [HIGH] Stored XSS via workspace key in overview + key not validated on init/set
payload.description: renderOverview (src/web/app.js:2782) renders ${p.key} unescaped (every other key sink escapes). workspace.init/set only validate key via isNonEmptyStr/isStr, NOT isKeyPrefix (event-schema.js:130,138), so a member pushes workspace.set key='' bypassing the HTTP deriveKey sanitizer. FIX: escapeHtml at the sink + enforce isKeyPrefix in validatePayload for workspace.init/set.
